faction.arcane-hunters.name: Arcane Hunters
hero.evadne.name: Evadne Corvel
hero.evadne.bio: Master of the Hunt with a half-runic face, once of the Circle of the Abyss. Her Huntresses never miss the same prey twice.
hero.evadne.specialty: Master of the Hunt — +1 attack to Huntresses per 2 levels.
hero.alwin.name: Professor Alwin Marchmont
hero.alwin.bio: Dean of the academy, more at ease with a grimoire than a blade. His owl familiar watches at his side from the very first day.
hero.alwin.specialty: Dean — a free familiar (Owl, T2) joins his army from the start.
unit.t1-eleve.name: Duskwatch Pupil
unit.t2-familier.name: Bound Familiar
unit.t3-prefet.name: Circle Prefect
unit.t4-bibliothecaire.name: Wandering Librarian
unit.t5-lame.name: Oathbound Blade
unit.t6-chasseresse.name: Abyss Huntress
unit.t7-manticore.name: Trained Manticore
unit.t8-penitent.name: Demonic Penitent
unit.t1-eleve-elite.name: Duskwatch Graduate
unit.t2-familier-elite.name: Elder Familiar
unit.t3-prefet-elite.name: High Prefect
unit.t4-bibliothecaire-elite.name: Living Archivist
unit.t5-lame-elite.name: Consecrated Blade
unit.t6-chasseresse-elite.name: Abyss Tracker
unit.t7-manticore-elite.name: Royal Manticore
unit.t8-penitent-elite.name: Damned Penitent
building.arcane-hunters-grail.lore: The Grail distils the Essence of hunted worlds, drop by drop, day after day.
unit.t1-eleve.lore: First lesson: set the Mark without flinching. The second, unspoken, is learning to love what it points at.
unit.t1-eleve-elite.lore: He signed the register and earned his hunting licence. Nobody told him the seal beneath his feet never held.
unit.t2-familier.lore: We loose it, it marks, it returns. The marked prey stops fighting back: it has already recognized its master in those eyes.
unit.t2-familier-elite.lore: Old familiars know every contract by heart. We no longer know if they serve us, or choose the prey themselves.
unit.t3-prefet.lore: He records who to mark, at what range, for how much gold. The hunt is paperwork; the Abyss keeps its ledgers too.
unit.t3-prefet-elite.lore: He has signed so many death warrants he files them by family. His own is there, last page, the ink still wet.
unit.t4-bibliothecaire.lore: He carries the forbidden library in his flesh. Each page read leaves a Mark; there is little untouched skin left.
unit.t4-bibliothecaire-elite.lore: We no longer consult him, we decipher him. What he knows of the demon, he has become, line by line.
unit.t5-lame.lore: The oath is simple: strike where the Mark burns. Three Marks, and the steel forgets it was ever a man.
unit.t5-lame-elite.lore: Consecrated to Duskwatch, never to a god. She fells the monster with the very motion she borrowed from it.
unit.t6-chasseresse.lore: Her shot pins the prey down for one breath. She always aims for the eyes; that is where she recognizes herself.
unit.t6-chasseresse-elite.lore: She follows a trail past the Seal, where no contract runs. What she brings back is no longer quite human.
unit.t7-manticore.lore: We call it trained. It lets us believe so, as long as we feed it Marks and look the other way.
unit.t7-manticore-elite.lore: No chain at its throat: it hunts beside us by agreement, not by command. We prefer not to reread that agreement.
unit.t8-penitent.lore: The Academy's logical end: to know the monster until you are it. He walks, confesses, and fells what he was yesterday.
unit.t8-penitent-elite.lore: His penance is over; his damnation begins. Duskwatch sends him first, to where the Seal lies loudest.
building.arcane-hunters-circle-vigile.lo: Here you learn to look before you believe. Know first: the Academy's opening word, cut above the threshold.
building.arcane-hunters-circle-traque.lo: The hall where the quarry is given a name. Mark next: what bears the sign is lost in the fog no more.
building.arcane-hunters-circle-sceau.lor: Here they study the seal of Duskwatch that it hold one more day. It is not reopened; it is endured.
building.arcane-hunters-circle-abime.lor: Here they touch what the Seal holds back, fingertip only, at their peril. Strike last — even at the cost of leaning in.
building.arcane-hunters-contracts.lore: A board, names nailed to it, a price on each. No hatred here: you fulfill the contract, then go home.
hero.olivier-arcane-hunters.name: Olivier
hero.olivier-arcane-hunters.bio: A graduate of Darkwatch's Circle of the Hunt, Olivier made the shadows his ally and poison his craft. An original creation, this assassin strikes once, surely, and vanishes before the riposte.
hero.olivier-arcane-hunters.specialty: Poisoned Blades — increased melee damage, venom eats through the target's armor
